node.title: Uber L4 (SDE2) vs Nutanix MTS4 | Offer Evaluation

article.title: Uber L4 (SDE2) vs Nutanix MTS4 | Offer Evaluation
article.content:
Education: Tier 1
YOE: 5.9
TC: 48 LPA

Uber L4 (SDE2) Offer:
Base: 42 LPA (Excluding EPF)
Sign On Bonus: 4 LPA
Performance Bonus: 7.05 LPA
RSU: 100k USD
Total including EPF : 77 LPA for first year, 73 LPA from second year 

Nutanix MTS4 Offer:
Base: 58LPA (including EPF)
RSU: 67k USD
Relocation Bonus: 2.5 LPA
Total : 74.5 LPA for first year, 72 LPA from second year

Which one should I choose considering future career progression, stock upside potential, work quality? WLB wont matter as much for now.

post.content: Uber anytime. Nutanix use to be good but not anymore.
go for Uber, heard from friend that Nutanix yearly hikes are poorly planned and numbers are very low.
can you please share your interview experience for Nutanix MTS-4 ?
yeah been 2-3 weeks, recruiter just went silent conveniently. I expect they will come back once I\'m bunked up under nuclear protection.
imo try for sse roles for future career
What was the initial uber offer ?\nAlso, how long it took after uber interviews to get the offer ?
current salary, if you dont mind?
Did you try to negotiate the Uber offer with the Nutanix one?
